# Pull Request Template

## Summary
What does this PR add or change?

## Category
- [ ] docs
- [ ] skill
- [ ] tool
- [ ] benchmark
- [ ] example
- [ ] profile/bootstrap
- [ ] tests
- [ ] validation

## Checklist
- [ ] Files are in the correct repository locations
- [ ] Reusable behavior is documented
- [ ] Tests added or updated where relevant
- [ ] Validation scripts still pass
- [ ] No unrelated generated files included

## Verification
Describe what you ran and what passed.
